nasb.text: for you once were not a people, but now you are the people of God; you had not received mercy, but now you have received mercy.

esv.text: Once you were not a people, but now you are God’s people; once you had not received mercy, but now you have received mercy.

cnv.text: “你們從前不是子民， 現在卻是　神的子民； 從前未蒙憐恤， 現在卻蒙了憐恤。”

ccb.text: 从前你们不是上帝的子民，现在却做了祂的子民；从前你们未蒙怜悯，现在却蒙了怜悯。

csbs.text: 你们从前不是子民， 但如今却是神的子民； 从前没有蒙怜悯， 但如今却蒙了怜悯。
